seoTitle: Jane Brook vs Jardee — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jane Brook and Jardee. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Jane Brook vs Jardee: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jane Brook and Jardee.
heading: Jane Brook vs Jardee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jane Brook, Western Australia and Jardee, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jane Brook has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Jardee (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jane Brook or Jardee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jane Brook has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Jardee scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jane Brook scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Jardee scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jane Brook or Jardee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jane Brook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
